---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# momentum estimate

## get estimate of op

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
include("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/08_RandomMeasAdd/src/RandomMeasAdd.jl")
using .RandomMeasAdd

```

### reflect op

```{julia}
N = 6
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit", N)
group_path = "./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz"
reduced_N = 4
permuted_order = [x for pair = 1:reduced_N ÷ 2 for x in (pair, N - pair + 1)];
@show get_reflect_expect_shadow(
    group_path,
    site_indices, 
    permuted_order;
    shadows_type="factorized"
)
```

### z_r

```{julia}
N = 6
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit", N)
group_path = "./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz"
reduced_N = 4
permuted_order = [x for pair = 1:reduced_N ÷ 2 for x in (pair, N - pair + 1)];
@show get_z_r_shadow(
    group_path,
    site_indices, 
    permuted_order;
    shadows_type="dense",
)
```

### z_t
